name: Central Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Central Park Pickleball Courts in Fernandina Beach, FL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights.

name: Nassau Pickleball 365
description: Nassau Pickleball 365 is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Yulee, FL. There are 8 indoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Ocean Coast Hotel Pickleball Courts
description: Ocean Coast Hotel Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fernandina Beach, FL. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Omni Amelia Island Resort
description: Omni Amelia Island Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fernandina Beach, FL. There are 7 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Shipwatch Villas
description: Shipwatch Villas is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fernandina Beach, FL. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: The Journey Church Yulee
description: The Journey Church Yulee is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fernandina Beach, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
